playbook.intent: 30-90 min with one design partner → N failure modes captured, turned into eval rows + roadmap items before session ends.
playbook.scope: 30-90 min sit with one design-partner customer, capture failure modes from their last week, turn N of them into eval rows + roadmap items before the session ends.

success-criteria.criterion: Each turned into an eval row or roadmap item
Trust signal: customer leaves with a citation back to the source

stage.name: Listen
stage.intent: Capture failure modes from last week.

tasks.task: Ask 'what did you expect vs what happened'

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when at least 3 concrete failures captured.

stage.name: Convert
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after each failure is mapped to an artefact.

stage.name: Close Loop
stage.intent: Show customer the eval rows landed.
stage.decision-gate: Close session only when customer sees their citation back to source.

extra.value: [Generic discovery interviewing — see solo playbooks, Pricing conversations]
[A signed design-partner customer, Eval harness reachable]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content customer-zero-feedback-loop-session --format md, agent: faion get-content customer-zero-feedback-loop-session --format context, json: faion get-content customer-zero-feedback-loop-session --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
